mapper.select: SELECT s.*, DATEDIFF(s.pharma_expiry_date, CURDATE()) as days_to_expire, CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(s.pharma_expiry_date, CURDATE()) <= 30 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as near_expiry FROM supplier s WHERE s.supplier_id = #{supplierId}

SELECT s.*, DATEDIFF(s.pharma_expiry_date, CURDATE()) as days_to_expire, CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(s.pharma_expiry_date, CURDATE()) <= 30 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as near_expiry FROM supplier s WHERE s.status = 1 AND ( DATEDIFF(s.pharma_expiry_date, CURDATE()) <= #{days} OR DATEDIFF(s.gsp_expiry_date, CURDATE()) <= #{days} OR DATEDIFF(s.license_expiry_date, CURDATE()) <= #{days} ) ORDER BY DATEDIFF(s.pharma_expiry_date, CURDATE()) ASC
